title: Potion Courier
description:
There is a [sine]sour[/sine] smell in the air and shortly after, you find a [gold]Potion Courier[/gold] collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. [jitter]Dead!?[/jitter]
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of [green][sine]Foul Smelling Potions[/sine][/green] with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".
notes: Choosing to grab the potions will award [blue]Foul Potions[/blue], which are potions unique to this event. The Ransack option provides an alternative reward of a random Uncommon Potion from your character's potion pool or the shared pool, allowing you to customize your potion rewards based on your current needs.
